ogTitle: Karragarra Island vs Karumba: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Karragarra Island and Karumba.
heading: Karragarra Island vs Karumba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Karragarra Island, Queensland and Karumba, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Karumba has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Karragarra Island (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Karragarra Island or Karumba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Karragarra Island has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Karumba scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Karragarra Island scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Karumba scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Karragarra Island or Karumba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Karumba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
